summary: Tested 9 assertions: 9 passed, 0 failed. All cross-area enforcement flows verified: model enforcement (VAL-CROSS-006), context preservation for all roles (VAL-CROSS-007), feature context across 20+ tool calls (VAL-CROSS-008), compaction recovery (VAL-CROSS-011), resume protocol state machine (VAL-CROSS-012), role separation enforcement (VAL-CROSS-013), relentless mode chain (VAL-CROSS-014), exit-mission bypass (VAL-CROSS-015), and mission-status features dashboard (VAL-CROSS-016).
